name: ReversingLabs TitaniumScale v2
description: App integrates with ReversingLabs TitaniumScale APIs

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of file to detonate

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Query for results of an already completed detonation

parameters.name: task_url
parameters.description: Task URL to get the report of

actions.name: Get Report By Id
actions.description: Query for results of an already completed detonation

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Unique ID assigned to each processing task

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: Specify if the full (true), or summary (false) report should be returned

parameters.name: v13
parameters.description: Specifies whether the report should be returned in TiScale 1.3 version (true), or not (false)

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Applied report transformation, see Customizing Analysis Report

parameters.name: custom_token
parameters.description: Custom string to filter processing tasks, if there are any files that were uploaded with that custom string in the X-TiScale-Token header

parameters.name: user_data
parameters.description: Additional JSON encoded payload. Used in parts of the processing pipeline.

parameters.name: custom_data
parameters.description: Any user defined JSON encoded payload. This data will be included in the analysis report.

actions.name: Get Task List
actions.description: List processing tasks generated by file submission requests

parameters.name: age
parameters.description: Number of seconds to filter processing tasks based on their age. When provided the API returns only those tasks that are older than the specified number of seconds.

parameters.name: custom_token
parameters.description: Custom string to filter processing tasks, if there are any files that were uploaded with that custom string in the X-TiScale-Token header

actions.name: Delete Processing Task
actions.description: Deletes a single processing task record from the system

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: ID of the task to delete

actions.name: Delete Processing Tasks
actions.description: Delete task records from the system based on the time when they were submitted

parameters.name: age
parameters.description: Number of seconds to delete processing tasks based on their age

actions.name: Get Yara Id
actions.description: Retrieve an identifier for the current set of YARA rules on the Worker instance
